=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
BOB DYLAN
Perth, Australia
Moonlight Music & Wine
Claremont Showgrounds
2003.03.15


same fingerprints described for the only circulating recording as reported on LB archivie:
pops t5 1:39 to 2:23,   crowd talking d1t1 2:xx

01 Tweedle Dee & Tweedle Dum 
02 I'll Be Your Baby Tonight
03 Highway 61 Revisited
04 Just Like A Woman
05 Things Have Changed
06 Drifter's Escape
07 Don't Think Twice, It's All Right
08 Masters Of War
09 Honest With Me
10 Bye And Bye
11 Summer Days
12 All Along The Watchtower 



Concert # 1495 of The Never-Ending Tour. Concert # 5 of the 2003 Tour Down Under. 2003 concert # 5.
Concert # 5 with the 15th Never-Ending Tour Band: Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar), Bill Burnette (guitar), Larry Campbell (guitar, mandolin, pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), George Recile (drums & percussion).

7, 8 acoustic with the band.
2, 6  Bob Dylan (harmonica).
2, 4 Larry Campbell (pedal steel guitar).
7 Larry Campbell (cittern).
9 Larry Campbell (slide guitar)
